column8: People have always told stories about those who lived long lives.
column9: Research has shown that Methuselah really was as old as is claimed.
column10: Medical care in the past helped people to live longer.
column11: It's sometimes difficult to check a person's real age.
column12: People who live in Ikaria and Okinawa do not get serious diseases.
column13: Life expectancy is now high in all parts of the world.
column14: Life expectancy will probably reach its highest possible level soon.
column15: Finding pleasure in life increases life expectancy.
